user.title: Connect to Wilma
user.description: Enter your Wilma school portal URL and login credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Wilma. Check the URL and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Check your username and password.
error.no_children: Login succeeded but no children were found on this account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Wilma account is already configured.

data.sender_filters: Message sender filters (comma-separated, e.g. *smith*, *jane*) — leave blank for all
data.message_limit: Max messages to fetch per child per poll
